g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Home.jsx component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ChatWindow.jsx')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about MessageBubble.jsx')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about InputBox.jsx')
sendPrompt('How does the POST /chat endpoint work?')
sendPrompt('How does the POST /schedule endpoint work?')
sendPrompt('How does the GET /doctors endpoint work?')
sendPrompt('How does the POST /call and /start-call endpoint work?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through all the states of the appointment scheduling flow')
sendPrompt('How does doctor availability matching work?')
sendPrompt('How does the prescription refill flow work?')
sendPrompt('How does gemini.js handle AI chat generation?')
sendPrompt('Explain the appointmentFlow.js state machine in detail')
sendPrompt('How do refillFlow.js and supportFlow.js work?')
sendPrompt('How does doctors.js match patients to the right specialist?')
sendPrompt('How does the email confirmation service work?')
sendPrompt('How do the SMS and Vapi voice services work?')
sendPrompt('What LLM model is used and why was Gemini chosen?')
sendPrompt('How is the system prompt and prompt engineering set up?')
sendPrompt('How does context window and conversation memory management work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Google Gemini API integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Vapi AI voice call integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Twilio SMS integration')
sendPrompt('How is SMTP email configured in this project?')
sendPrompt('What data validation does the system perform?')
sendPrompt('How does session context management work?')
sendPrompt('What error handling and graceful degradation patterns are used?')
sendPrompt('What is the customer support and escalation flow?')
sendPrompt('What security measures are implemented in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is on the future roadmap for this system?')
